intro: Gamanthus gamocarpus, also known as the desert-holly or Iranian sea-buckthorn, is a small, shrub-like plant native to the Middle East. The health benefits of Gamanthus gamocarpus include its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various health conditions, including wounds, gastrointestinal disorders, and respiratory infections.
